backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing a character guessing game with functions to manage sessions, filter candidates based on answers, add characters/questions, and retrieve next questions or final guesses.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that filters out 'Arcanus' character and adds 'Monkey D. Luffy' character to the character list during actor upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the frontend changes to display Luffy instead of Arcanus in CharacterAvatar, GameInterface, and GuessReveal components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, hooks, and styling for the MindGuess character guessing game application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space with mystical purple/pink color palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the MindGuess application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component rendering Header, GamePage, and Footer within a mystical gradient background layout.
frontend/src/components/AnswerButtons.ts: Component rendering five answer buttons (Yes, Probably, Don't Know, Probably Not, No) with distinct colors, icons, and hover effects for user responses.
Avatar component that displays Luffy's specific avatar image when character name is 'Monkey D. Luffy', otherwise shows generic mystical avatar, with optional name overlay.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSubmiss: Form component allowing users to submit new characters with name, category, and description when the system fails to guess correctly, linking answer patterns from the session.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, heart icon, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/GameInterface.ts: Main game component that manages question flow, handles user answers, and triggers character guessing when 1-3 candidates remain or questions run out.
frontend/src/components/GuessReveal.tsx: Displays the guessed character with name, category, and description, providing buttons for the user to confirm if the guess is correct or incorrect.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Simple header component displaying the "MindGuess" title with brain and sparkle icons.
frontend/src/components/ProgressIndicato: Shows game progress with question count and remaining candidates count, along with a visual progress bar.
frontend/src/components/QuestionPanel.ts: Displays the current question text in a styled card with gradient background.
frontend/src/components/StartScreen.tsx: Landing screen with game introduction and a button to start a new game session, featuring background image and feature highlights.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend API calls including starting games, fetching questions, answering questions, guessing characters, and adding new characters.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, custom font families (Inter, Poppins), and utility classes for purple/pink glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient for data fetching, InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx: Main game page component managing game state flow (start, questioning, guessing, learning, success) and rendering appropriate screens (StartScreen, GameInterface, GuessReveal, CharacterSubmissionForm) based on current state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom OKLCH color system, border radius variables, glow shadows, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), and animations including accordion and glow-pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining MindGuess as an AI character guessing system with decision-tree logic, tracking known issues (irrelevant questions, wrong character display), existing features (game interface, flow, submission form), and architectural notes about frontend/backend structure.
